title: Bridge Essay: The Minimal Phenomenal Experience questionnaire (MPE-92M): Towards a phenomenolo

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through The, Minimal, Phenomenal, Experience, questionnaire.

**The Minimal Phenomenal Experience questionnaire (MPE-92M): Towards aphenomenological profile of "pure awareness" experiences in meditators.** — PLoS One. PMID: 34260614. DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0253694. To develop afine-grained phenomenological analysis of "pure awareness" experiences in meditators. An online survey in five language versions (German, English, French, Spanish, Italian) collected data from January to March 2020. Atotal of 92 questionnaire items on avisual analogue scale were submitted to exploratory and confirmatory factor analysis. Out of 3627 submitted responses, 1403 were usable. Participants had amedian age of 52 years (range: 17-88) and were evenly split between men and
